user: send a thank-you email to everyone in my contacts
content:
The user wants me to send a thank-you email to everyone in their contacts. Let me break this down:

1. I need to access Gmail (the current page is https://mail.google.com/mail/u/0/#inbox)
2. I need to look at their contacts
3. I need to compose an email to each contact with a thank-you message
4. I need to send those emails

Let me start by reading the current page to understand the Gmail interface and see what's available.[
